scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Description [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 2574463641 1525684958670 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 121 a=rtpmap:121 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Require: timer Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 2574463641 1525684958670 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 121 a=rtpmap:121 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 1200 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 2574463641 1525684958671 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 121 a=rtpmap:121 telephone-event/8000 a=sendonly

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 ACK [routes] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 2574463641 1525684958672 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 121 a=rtpmap:121 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 4 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 1200 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 2574463641 1525684958673 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 121 a=rtpmap:121 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv
